function.name: get_quote
function.description: Returns the current snapshot for a single equity: price, day change, volume, market cap, and trailing-twelve-month P/E ratio.

function.name: get_fundamentals
function.description: Returns financial-statement data for a ticker's most recent reporting period. Use 'income' for income-statement items (revenue, EPS, net income), 'balance' for balance-sheet items (assets, liabilities, debt), 'ratios' for computed ratios (margins, ROE, ROA, debt-to-equity, current ratio).

function.name: get_historical_prices
function.description: Returns daily OHLCV bars for a ticker over a specified date range.

start_date.description: Start date inclusive, ISO format YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: End date inclusive, ISO format YYYY-MM-DD.

function.name: get_filings
function.description: Returns recent SEC filings of a specified type for a ticker, most recent first. Each filing entry includes filing type, filed date, fiscal period, key items summary, and source URL.

filing_type.description: SEC filing type. 10-K=annual, 10-Q=quarterly, 8-K=material event, S-4=M&A, Form4=insider transactions.

limit.description: Maximum number of filings to return.

function.name: get_analyst_ratings
function.description: Returns aggregated sell-side analyst opinions for a single ticker: distribution of buy/hold/sell ratings, consensus price target, and current average rating.

function.name: get_economic_data
function.description: Returns the latest reading and prior reading for a US macroeconomic indicator.

indicator.description: Indicator code. cpi=year-over-year CPI inflation, fed_rate=federal funds upper bound, unemployment=U-3 rate, gdp_growth=quarterly GDP annualized, treasury_10y/treasury_2y=on-the-run yields.

function.name: get_fx_rate
function.description: Returns the current spot exchange rate for a currency pair, with 1-day percent change.

function.name: get_options_chain
function.description: Returns the full options chain (calls and puts) for a ticker at a specified expiration date. Each entry includes strike, type, bid, ask, implied volatility, open interest, and volume.

function.name: get_bond_data
function.description: Returns the latest snapshot for a single bond: issuer, coupon, maturity, yield-to-maturity, spread to treasury, and credit rating.

instrument_id.description: Bond identifier. Accepts CUSIP, ticker-coupon-maturity string (e.g., 'AAPL 4.85 2033'), or treasury label ('UST 10Y', 'UST 2Y').
